questions: Does the patient have mild to moderate damage? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have severe damage? (Yes/No)
Is the patient intolerant to topical medication? (Yes/No)
Does the patient fail medical therapy? (Yes/No)
Is the patient non-compliant with treatment? (Yes/No)
Is the patient's IOP higher than 28 mmHg? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have chronic airway disease? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have pulmonary edema? (Yes/No)
